theater_comedy May 14 – 31, 2026

Programs & Schedule

节目与日程 | 精彩纷呈

Five productions, one stand-up comedy special, five workshops, and two industry talks — spread across four areas of Chicago.

Productions | 剧目

Five works, four groups, one city

UChicago Windmill Chinese Drama Club · 芝加哥大学风车剧社

A Doll's House

《玩偶之家》

A woman who has been living like a doll ultimately chooses to leave her home to claim her dignity and freedom.
一个被当作玩偶活着的女人，最终选择离开家庭，去争取作为人的尊严与自由。

calendar_todayMay 17–19, 2026 scheduleMay 17: 2pm & 7pm · May 18: 7pm–9:30pm · May 19: 7pm–9:30pm location_onFXK Theater (三楼)
Full Details | 详情 Tickets | 购票

UChicago Windmill Chinese Drama Club · 芝加哥大学风车剧社

No Exit

《禁闭》

Hell is other people. A minimalist take on Sartre's existential classic.
他人即地狱。——对萨特存在主义经典的一次极简演绎。

calendar_todayMay 22–24, 2026 scheduleMay 22–24: Evening performances location_onFXK Theater (三楼)
Full Details | 详情 Tickets | 购票

UChicago Windmill Chinese Drama Club · 芝加哥大学风车剧社

The Flying Heart

《会飞的心》

A stand-up comedy special by Zhaoyang — Windmill's founder, now active on the Silicon Valley comedy scene.
昭阳——风车剧社创始人、现活跃于硅谷脱口秀舞台——带着巡演作品回到芝加哥。

calendar_todayMay 20, 2026 scheduleMay 20 (Tuesday) · 7:30pm location_onFXK Theater
Full Details | 详情 Tickets | 购票

Dong Fang Drama Group · 东方话剧团

An Act of Grace

《杀了我》

Three people. Three sets of calculations. A dangerous endgame that twists until the very last line.
三个人、三种算计、一盘暗流涌动的残局，在不断推进中层层翻转，直到最后一句台词仍保留悬念。

calendar_todayMay 31, 2026 scheduleSaturday · 2:00pm & 6:00pm location_onDong Fang Drama Group Small Theatre
Full Details | 详情 Tickets | 购票

Northwestern Eighthday Theatre Club · 西北大学周八剧社

Hidden Treasure

《隐藏的宝藏》

An unexpected fortune lays bare the greed and absurdity of human nature.
一笔意外出现的财富，照出了人性的欲望与荒诞。

calendar_todayMay 29–30, 2026 scheduleMay 29–30: Evening performances location_onNorthwestern University, Evanston
Full Details | 详情 Tickets | 购票

SAIC Chinese Theatre Club · 芝加哥艺术学院中文剧社

Stone, Sun, Red

《石头，太阳，红色》

A struggle over expression and an inquiry into existence — between wit and seriousness.
一次关于表达的挣扎，也是一场关于存在的追问，并试图在诙谐与严肃之间，让观者体会到轻盈的重量。

calendar_todayMay 16–17, 2026 scheduleMay 16–17: Evening performances location_onSAIC, Downtown Chicago (Loop)
Full Details | 详情 Tickets | 购票
